app.title: Job Application Assistant
app.dataLocal: Data stays in your browser. Export a backup anytime.

list.title: My resumes
list.subtitle: Name each file and add a short description so you know which posting or role it targets.
list.tip: Tip: “Save as…” duplicates a row without opening it. From AI Polish, use “← My resumes” in the header to return to this list.

resume.heading: Resume
resume.subtitle: Edit with inline AI suggestions. Accept or reject each change. Nothing is applied without your confirmation.

jd.heading: Job description
jd.subtitle: Paste the posting text. Nothing is uploaded without your consent.
jd.label: Posting text
jd.placeholder: Paste the full job description here (title, responsibilities, requirements)…

hint.empty: Paste a full posting to get a meaningful fit review.
hint.tooShort: This looks short for a full posting. Paste more detail if you can.
hint.lowSignal: This may not be a typical job description. Double-check you pasted the right text.
hint.ok: Looks like a reasonable posting length.

jd.footerHint: After you paste the posting, run analysis to compare it to your current resume.

flow.hintJd: Step 1 of 3 · Paste the job posting, then run analysis.
flow.hintLoading: Step 2 of 3 · Analysis in progress — stay on this tab.
flow.hintResults: Step 2 of 3 · Review traceability, gaps, and fit — then continue to your resume.
flow.hintError: Step 2 of 3 · Analysis failed — edit the posting or retry.

analysis.jdNextHint: Continue runs analysis. Loading and results replace this panel when ready.
analysis.jdFooterNote: You won’t see posting, loading, and results all at once — they swap in this column.
analysis.loadingTitle: Analyzing fit, gaps, and JD traceability…
analysis.loadingBody: Comparing your resume to this posting. This usually takes a few seconds.
analysis.loadingHint: You can leave this tab open. Results will appear here when ready.
analysis.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
analysis.traceEmpty: No JD lines were extracted for traceability yet.
analysis.ctaBody: When you’re ready, continue to step 3: open the Resume tab and apply AI suggestions.
analysis.ctaHint: Same as the Resume item in the sidebar (or ← My resumes in the header).
analysis.privacy: Privacy: resume and posting text are stored locally in this browser (IndexedDB). Export creates a JSON file on your device. This MVP runs analysis in your browser without a login; review the export if you share backups.
